title: Haribo Sweets Snack Bag, Plushie Pillow Friends, Squeeze Fidget Toy - Share With Your Friends, 5 Plushies Per Pack, Pretend Imaginative Play, Gift 3+ (Giant Strawbz)
features: CHOOSE YOUR STYLE: Select between FOUR deliciously fun Haribo options: GOLDBEARS, HAPPY COLA, CHAMALLOWS PINK & WHITE & GIANT STRAWBS.
CHOOSE YOUR SIZE: Select between two sizes: Standard Size : - ‎17cm x 4cm x 19 cm, Large Size: 36cm x 6cm x 44cm (sold separately)
FUN & ADORABLE PLUSHIE FRIENDS: Each pack contains 5 sweet-themed, soft fidget toys, packaged in a colourful sweet-inspired zippable packet.
PLUSHIE FRIENDS: Each plushie friend showcase playful expressions that add charm and personality to every cuddle.

IDEAL FOR FIDGETING & COLLECTING: Perfect for both kids and adults who love cute plushies. Great for reducing stress, keeping hands busy, or simply having fun. These plushies are also ideal for sharing with loved ones and friends or for pretend/imaginative play.
PERFECT GIFT: A wonderful gift idea for birthdays, holidays, or as a special treat.
SAFE FOR AGES 0+: Soft, squeezable, and kid-friendly.
description: Product description Add a little sweetness to your life with Haribo Sweets Plushie Friends Fidget Toys! Available in FOUR delightful styles : GOLDBEARS HAPPY COLA BOTTLES CHAMALLOWS PINK & WHITE GIANT STRAWBZ Available in two delightful sizes : Standard Size: 17cm x 4cm x 19 cm Large Size: 36cm x 6cm x 44cm Each pack includes 5 soft, squishy plushies that are as much fun to squeeze as they are to collect. Perfect for fidgeting, gifting, or just cuddling up with these adorable plushie friends. These sweet-themed plushies are made from soft, squeezable material and come in a bright, sweet-themed packet that adds a fun, colourful touch. Whether you’re looking for a playful, stress-relieving fidget toy, a collectible item, or simply a sweet gift for a loved one, these plushie friends are the perfect choice. Collect all styles, share them with your friends, or even give them as a thoughtful gift! Note: Please select your preferred style and size from the menu before purchasing. Additional Information: Package Includes: 5x Plushie Friends ( Material: Soft plush fabric Recommended Age: 0+ MTHS and up Safety Warning Adult Supervision Required At All Times. Remove Tags, Ties and Packaging and Any Accessories Before Giving to a Young Child.
